name: The Murder of H.
short_description: Investigate the murder of Sherlock Holmes in an immersive VR adventure. Interact with the world as if it were real, solve clever puzzles, and enjoy a comfortable and accessible experience, perfect for both beginners and seasoned players.
detailed_description:
A VR ESCAPE ROOM WHERE EVERYTHING FEELS REAL

🕵️‍♂️ Explore an authentic voxel reconstruction of 221B Baker Street as if you were really there. No complicated menus, no artificial interfaces—just you, your intuition, and a fully interactive environment.

🔎 A Mystery to Uncover – Sherlock Holmes has disappeared, and the key to the mystery lies hidden in his own room. Search for clues, experiment, and solve puzzles at your own pace.

🥽 Natural Movement, No Barriers – Walk freely, crouch to examine details, or reach out to grab objects. No buttons to memorize—everything feels just like real life

🖐️ Interact with Everything Around You – Immerse yourself in a world full of details:

✔️ Play Sherlock Holmes’ violin 🎻

✔️ Experiment with chemical mixtures 🧪

✔️ Enjoy the books in his library and uncover hidden secrets 📚

🧩 Puzzles Designed for Exploration and Discovery – Observe, experiment, and find the logic behind every puzzle hidden in the room of the world’s most famous detective.

📌 A Short Yet Immersive Experience – Designed to be enjoyed in a single session, perfect for those looking for a VR escape room without long play sessions.

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain*, French, Italian, German, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Russian
*languages with full audio support
